elements.original_description: A cheerful person holding shopping bags filled with colorful items, smiling widely, on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a cheerful person holding several shopping bags overflowing with brightly colored items, smiling widely with genuine joy. The person is centered on a perfectly pure white background. The style is a realistic, high-resolution photograph with bright, cheerful lighting that enhances the feeling of positive, impulsive shopping.

elements.original_description: A glowing thumbs-up icon with a happy face, symbolizing 'good', centered on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon: a glowing thumbs-up symbol with a simple, happy face drawn on it, centered on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The style is modern, digital, and represents positive affirmation.
